description_long: This object is a vintage CRT computer monitor with a beige plastic casing and a large, slightly curved glass display at the front. The front panel features a series of tactile buttons and a vented speaker grille below the screen, with a small colored emblem on the lower right. The sides are plain with subtle ventilation slits, while the rear is characterized by prominent cooling vents, a recessed handle, and several ports and labels. The monitor sits on a flat, integrated base that is part of the main housing, providing stability. The overall design is boxy with rounded edges, typical of late 20th-century computer monitors.
description: A beige, boxy vintage CRT computer monitor with a curved glass screen, front control buttons, and rear ventilation. The design features rounded edges and a flat integrated base.
description_view_0: Rear view showing large ventilation slits, a recessed handle, multiple ports, and manufacturer labels.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain beige surface with a small ventilation slit near the top and no visible controls or ports.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the curved glass screen, a row of control buttons, a vented speaker grille, and a small colored emblem on the lower right.
description_view_3: Right side view with three circular ports near the bottom and a plain surface, mirroring the left side's shape.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, made of beige plastic, with rounded corners and a smooth matte finish. It features a vented section below the screen and a small colored emblem on the lower right.
attribute_stand_type: Integrated flat base, part of the main housing, rectangular and flush with the bottom, made of the same beige plastic with no visible adjustability.
attribute_button_placement: A row of tactile buttons is located along the bottom edge of the front panel, directly below the screen and to the right of the vented grille. The buttons are grouped together.
attribute_port_visibility: Visible on the rear and right side; rear has several ports and connectors, right side has three circular ports near the bottom.
attribute_brand_logo: A small colored emblem is visible on the lower right of the front bezel; additional manufacturer labels are present on the rear panel.
